nodes.name: Webhook
nodes.notes: Path should be seo-content/research or match N8N_WEBHOOK_BASE_URL + /research

nodes.name: Find Selected Idea
nodes.notes: Resolve selected idea from job.ideas by selectedIdeaId

nodes.name: Prepare Prompt
nodes.notes: Map client, seed keyword, selected idea title, angle, and related keywords

nodes.name: Research LLM
nodes.notes: Use the prompt template from src/lib/n8n-research-template.ts and enforce JSON output

nodes.name: Callback
nodes.notes: POST structured result back to /api/n8n/callback with x-callback-secret
